name: freshfork-crm
description: Freshfork CRM — Polish B2B CRM. Adds an API reference, business workflows (add client by NIP, add/edit a product, create an order, manage stock, post an invoice PDF as an expense or a purchase invoice with a PZ receipt document, ...), and end-user UI walkthroughs so Claude can either drive the CRM over its REST API or explain to a non-technical user where to click in the admin.
